description:
Hlo Welcom,
In this video, we take an in-depth look at the ICICI Lombard telematics device that comes with both a GPS tracker and an OBD scanner. Whether you’re new to telematics or looking to understand more about these features, this video covers everything you need to know.
Agar aapko is device ko install karna hai, toh yeh kuch general steps follow kiye ja sakte hain:
📌 Key Features:
GPS Tracker: Real-time location tracking, route monitoring, and theft protection.
OBD Scanner: Vehicle diagnostics, performance monitoring, and engine health checks.
Installation:
 GPS tracker aur OBD scanner ko car ke respective ports me connect karna hota hai. OBD scanner ko usually car ke OBD-II port me plug kiya jata hai, jo aksar steering wheel ke neeche hota hai. GPS tracker ko car ke hidden spot me install kiya jata hai, jahan se ye easily signal receive kar sake.
GPS Tracker:
Location Tracking: Ye aapki car ki real-time location ko track karta hai. Agar aapki car chori ho jaye, toh GPS tracker ki madad se aap usse locate kar sakte hain.
Route Tracking: Ye aapke travel routes ko record karta hai, jo aapko apni driving patterns ko analyze karne me madad kar sakta hai.
Video ke end mein, viewers ko aapke channel ko subscribe karne, video ko like karne, aur comment karne ke liye encourage karein.#ICICILombard #TelematicsDevice #GPSTracker #OBDScanner #CarInsurance #VehicleDiagnostics #CarTech #DrivingSafety #TechReview #automotivetech 
I hope you enjoyed this short video
hit likes.
And do subscribe to my channel
